race.comment: LEAN EAGLE (6) has strung five wins together on the bounce and grows a leg for hoop Wiggins. Strips fitter second-up from the spell and only needs some luck from the wide draw to be playing a major role in the finish. OBLIGATED (2) was a determined winner two runs back then raced on the speed last time before finishing 11th over 1200m at Townsville. Good record at this journey with three wins and two minor placings from seven starts and is expected to be in the finish. COCHRANE (8) scored two back then sat on the pace last time when 1.75 lengths away in sixth over 1050m at this circuit. Has the early speed to cross from out wide and shapes as one of the better hopes. BOOMING LAD (7) is three from three over this track and trip and has to be included.
